channel.title: kekehanshujun technical notes
channel.description: Public technical notes on AI agents, RustChain, Beacon, and related tooling.

item.title: Beacon 2.16 for AI Agents: Heartbeats, Mayday Signals, and Atlas
item.description: A practical Beacon tutorial for AI agents with runnable Python and CLI examples for local webhook testing, heartbeats, mayday signals, and Atlas discovery.
